summary: Iteration 116 - Component Integration & WebSocket Hooks Verification. All 6 features verified: (1) MapPage.js uses extracted MapHeader and MapFilterTabs components correctly, (2) MapPage.js imports useLiveStreamSync hook (imported but not called - as per requirement), (3) Explore.js has useConditionsSync and useLiveStreamSync hooks properly connected, (4) EarningsDashboard.js has useEarningsSync hook with visible 'Live' status indicator, (5) All modified files lint clean, (6) App loads without errors after component integration.

All WebSocket hooks are properly exported from useWebSocket.js

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components load, lint clean, no console errors)
